name: MAST P60 Premium permanent makeup machine – Rosegold
shortDescription: Wireless permanent makeup machine with 5-level adjustable stroke length, coreless motor, and 3+ hours operating time. Rosegold edition.
description:
The MAST P60 is a wireless permanent makeup machine designed by Dragonhawk specifically for the permanent makeup field.

Thanks to its built-in battery, it provides complete freedom of movement, while the ergonomic design and mere 121-gram weight reduce hand fatigue during longer work sessions.

One of its special features is the 5-level adjustable stroke length (2.2–3.2 mm), which is rare among permanent makeup machines. This enables techniques ranging from fine hair-stroke eyebrows to shaded effects, as well as adaptation to different skin types.

The quiet coreless motor minimizes noise and vibration, providing a more comfortable experience for both the artist and the client.
